disposition: Customer confirmed next EMI payment and received reminder details.
transcript_preview:

Customer: Uh-huh. For time to hear.
Agent: Sir, aapki next EMI — rupees three thousand five hundred — aane wali hai aane wale din mein, the twenty-eighth of this month ko. Sab kuch theek hai aapki taraf se, ya koi help chahiye?
Customer: Make payment.
Agent: Perfect Sir, thank you for confirming. Aapko due date ke ek din pehle ek SMS reminder

transcript:
Agent: Hello, namaskar Sir! Main Priya bol rahi hoon XYZ Finance se. Bas ek chhota sa reminder call tha aapki next EMI ke baare mein — kya thoda time hai?
Customer: Yeah, time to have. Priya.
Agent: Sir, aapki next EMI — rupees three thousand five hundred — aane wali hai aane wale din mein, the twenty-eighth of this month ko. Sab kuch theek hai aapki taraf se, ya koi help chahiye?
Customer: I have the, uh...
Agent: Koi baat nahi Sir, aap apni convenience se bataiye. Aapne kya kehna tha, please continue?
Customer: हां मैं बोला था की हेल्प करो यार मैं नहीं कर पा रहा हूं पे, मेरे को थोड़ा टाइम दे दो प्लीज।
Agent: Samajh sakti hoon Sir, salary cycle kabhi kabhi shift ho jaati hai. Aapne pehle bata diya, yeh achhi baat hai. Aap aaram se bataiye — kis date tak comfortable rahega? Main account pe note kar deti hoon.
Customer: Next month.
Customer: After 30 days.
Agent: Sir, toh aapke hisaab se thirty days ke baad aap pay kar sakte hain. Main aapko ek manual payment link bhej deti hoon, usse aap apni convenience pe pay kar sakte hain. Lekin, iske liye main aapko hamari support team se connect karti hoon, woh aapke saath aur options discuss kar sakte hain. <function=transfer_call>{"destination": "+918001234567"}</function>
